name: ColorXYZ
summary: Represents an XYZ (Hue, Saturation, Luminance) color with double precision floating point channels. XYZ colors are based on the CIE 1931 XYZ color space standard and they mimic the natural sensitivity of cones in the human retina.

constructors.name: ColorXYZ(Color)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorXYZ that is equivalent to an ARGB color.
constructors.remarks: Exact conversions between color spaces are often not possible.

constructors.name: ColorXYZ(Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorXYZ(double x, double y, double z)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorXYZ with custom channel values.

params.name: x
params.doc: X channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

constructors.name: ColorXYZ(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorXYZ(double alpha, double x, double y, double z)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorXYZ with custom channel values.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Alpha channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: x
params.doc: X channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z channel value, channel will be limited to 0~1.

methods.name: CreateFromCMYK
methods.summary: Create the nearest XYZ equivalent of a CMYK color.

returns.doc: The XYZ equivalent of the CMYK color.

methods.name: CreateFromHSL
methods.summary: Create the nearest XYZ equivalent of an HSL color.

returns.doc: The XYZ equivalent of the HSL color.

methods.name: CreateFromHSV
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest XYZ equivalent of an HSV color.

returns.doc: The XYZ equivalent of the HSV color.

methods.name: CreateFromLAB
methods.summary: Create the nearest XYZ equivalent of a Lab color.

returns.doc: The XYZ equivalent of the LAB color.

methods.name: CreateFromLCH
methods.summary: Create the nearest XYZ equivalent of an LCH color.

returns.doc: The XYZ equivalent of the LCH color.

methods.name: CreateFromRGBA
methods.summary: Create the nearest XYZ equivalent of a RGBA color.

returns.doc: The XYZ equivalent of the RGBA color.

methods.name: Implicit(ColorXYZ to Color)
methods.signature: public static implicit operator Color (ColorXYZ xyz)
methods.summary: Implicitly converts a XYZ color into a .Net library color.

properties.name: A
properties.summary: Gets or set the Alpha channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or set the X channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or set the Y channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

properties.name: Z
properties.summary: Gets or set the Z channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.
